2604.26733.title: FutureWorld: A Live Environment for Training Predictive Agents with Real-World Outcome Rewards
2604.26733.paper_summary: Live future prediction refers to the task of making predictions about real-world events before they unfold. This task is increasingly studied using large language model-based agent systems, and it is important for building agents that can continually learn from real-world. Just as interactive environments have often driven progress in agents, advancing live future prediction naturally motivates viewing it as a learning environment. Prior works have explored future prediction from several different parts, but have generally not framed it as a unified learning environment. This task is appealing for learning because it can provide a large number of prediction questions grounded in diverse real-world events, while preventing answer leakage. To leverage the advantages of live future prediction, we present FutureWorld, a live agentic reinforcement learning environment that closes the training loop between prediction, outcome realization, and parameters update. In our environment, we take three open-source base models and train them for consecutive days. The results show that training is effective. Furthermore, we build a daily benchmark based on the environment and evaluate several frontier agents on it to establish performance baselines for current agent systems.
2604.26733.paper_summary_zh: 即時未來預測是指在現實事件展開之前對其進行預測的任務。<lb/>這項任務越來越多地使用基於大型語言模型的代理系統進行研究，對於構建能夠不斷從現實世界學習的代理來說，這是非常重要的。<lb/>正如互動環境經常推動代理的進步一樣，推進即時未來預測自然促使將其視為一個學習環境。<lb/>先前的研究從幾個不同的方面探討了未來預測，但通常沒有將其框架化為一個統一的學習環境。<lb/>這項任務對於學習來說是有吸引力的，因為它可以提供大量基於多樣化現實事件的預測問題，同時防止答案洩漏。<lb/>為了利用即時未來預測的優勢，我們提出了FutureWorld，一個即時代理強化學習環境，該環境關閉了預測、結果實現和參數更新之間的訓練循環。<lb/>在我們的環境中，我們選取三個開源基礎模型並對其進行連續幾天的訓練。<lb/>結果顯示訓練是有效的。<lb/>此外，我們基於該環境建立了一個每日基準，並在其上評估幾個前沿代理，以建立當前代理系統的性能基準。
2604.26733.author: Zhixin Han et.al.
2604.26733.authors: Zhixin Han, Yanzhi Zhang, Chuyang Wei, Maohang Gao, Xiawei Yue, Kefei Chen, Yu Zhuang, Haoxiang Guan, Jiyan He, Jian Li, Yitong Duan, Yu Shi, Mengting Hu, Shuxin Zheng
